SEARCH
Module com.videolibrary
Package com.videolibrary.rmi

Class VlsServiceImpl

java.lang.Object
java.rmi.server.RemoteObject
java.rmi.server.RemoteServer
java.rmi.server.UnicastRemoteObject
com.videolibrary.rmi.VlsServiceImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
VlsService, Serializable, Remote
public class VlsServiceImpl extends UnicastRemoteObject implements VlsService
The server-side implementation of the VlsService remote interface. This class handles direct JDBC connections to the XAMPP MySQL database to process all client requests for the Video Library System. * @author Gift
Version:
1.0
See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • VlsServiceImpl

      public VlsServiceImpl() throws RemoteException
      Constructs the implementation service and tests the database connection. * @throws RemoteException if the RMI export fails.
      Throws:
      RemoteException

  • Method Details

    • registerMovie

      public boolean registerMovie(String title, String genre) throws RemoteException
      Registers a new movie into the database under a specific genre. * @param title The title of the movie.
      Specified by:
      registerMovie in interface VlsService
      Parameters:
      genre - The genre category for the movie.
      Returns:
      true if the movie was successfully saved, false otherwise.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - if a network communication error occurs.

    • registerCustomer

      public boolean registerCustomer(String name, String phone, String email) throws RemoteException
      Registers a new customer into the database. * @param name The full name of the customer.
      Specified by:
      registerCustomer in interface VlsService
      Parameters:
      phone - The contact phone number of the customer.
      email - The contact email address of the customer.
      Returns:
      true if the customer was successfully saved, false otherwise.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - if a network communication error occurs.

    • getGenres

      public List<String> getGenres() throws RemoteException
      Retrieves a list of all active genres from the database. * @return A List of strings representing genre names.
      Specified by:
      getGenres in interface VlsService
      Throws:
      RemoteException - if a network communication error occurs.

    • getMoviesByGenre

      public List<Movie> getMoviesByGenre(String genre) throws RemoteException
      Retrieves a list of all active movies belonging to a specific genre. * @param genre The name of the genre to filter by.
      Specified by:
      getMoviesByGenre in interface VlsService
      Returns:
      A List of Movie objects matching the specified genre.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - if a network communication error occurs.

    • getCustomers

      public List<String> getCustomers() throws RemoteException
      Retrieves a list of all active registered customers from the database. * @return A List of strings representing customer names.
      Specified by:
      getCustomers in interface VlsService
      Throws:
      RemoteException - if a network communication error occurs.

    • removeGenre

      public boolean removeGenre(String genreName) throws RemoteException
      Performs a soft delete to remove a genre from active listings. * @param genreName The name of the genre to deactivate.
      Specified by:
      removeGenre in interface VlsService
      Returns:
      true if the genre was successfully deactivated, false otherwise.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - if a network communication error occurs.

    • removeMovie

      public boolean removeMovie(int movieId) throws RemoteException
      Performs a soft delete to remove a movie from active listings. * @param movieId The unique ID of the movie to deactivate.
      Specified by:
      removeMovie in interface VlsService
      Returns:
      true if the movie was successfully deactivated, false otherwise.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - if a network communication error occurs.

    • rentMovie

      public boolean rentMovie(String customerName, int movieId) throws RemoteException
      Assigns a movie rental to a specific customer. * @param customerName The name of the customer renting the movie.
      Specified by:
      rentMovie in interface VlsService
      Parameters:
      movieId - The unique ID of the movie being rented.
      Returns:
      true if the rental was successfully recorded, false otherwise.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - if a network communication error occurs.

    • returnMovie

      public boolean returnMovie(String customerName, int movieId) throws RemoteException
      Processes the return of a previously rented movie. * @param customerName The name of the customer returning the movie.
      Specified by:
      returnMovie in interface VlsService
      Parameters:
      movieId - The unique ID of the movie being returned.
      Returns:
      true if the return was successfully updated, false otherwise.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - if a network communication error occurs.

    • registerGenre

      public boolean registerGenre(String genreName) throws RemoteException
      Registers a new genre into the database. * @param genreName The name of the genre to be added.
      Specified by:
      registerGenre in interface VlsService
      Returns:
      true if the genre was successfully saved, false otherwise.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - if a network communication error occurs.

    • getBorrowedMovies

      public List<Movie> getBorrowedMovies(String customerName) throws RemoteException
      Retrieves a list of movies currently borrowed (and not yet returned) by a customer. * @param customerName The name of the customer to look up.
      Specified by:
      getBorrowedMovies in interface VlsService
      Returns:
      A List of Movie objects currently in the customer's possession.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - if a network communication error occurs.

    • getReturnedMovies

      public List<Movie> getReturnedMovies(String customerName) throws RemoteException
      Retrieves a list of movies that a customer has previously borrowed and successfully returned. * @param customerName The name of the customer to look up.
      Specified by:
      getReturnedMovies in interface VlsService
      Returns:
      A List of Movie objects returned by the customer.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - if a network communication error occurs.
